title: Monitoring: NetFlow Monitor Apply, VLAN 12 SPAN, IP SLA ICMP Echo to PC1
guidelines: Refer to the Tasks tab to view the tasks for this lab item.
Refer to the Topology tab to access the device console(s) and perform the tasks.
Console access is available for all required devices.
All necessary preconfigurations have been applied.
Do not change the enable password or hostname for any device.
Save your configurations to NVRAM before moving to the next item.
tasks: Enable Flexible NetFlow on R1 E0/0 in both directions using the pre-configured flow monitor.
Configure the switch port analyzer on Sw1 and mirror all VLAN 12 traffic to interface E1/3 using session number 12.
Configure a basic IP SLA ICMP echo operation on R1 to ping PC1 every 300 seconds.

required.line: ip sla schedule 10 life forever start-time now

hints: R1'de 'show run | sec sla' ile SLA ID'nin 10 olup olmadığını doğrula; farklıysa gerçek ID'yi kullan.
R1'de 'show flow monitor' ile monitor adının Monitor-R1Flow olup olmadığını doğrula; farklıysa gerçek adı kullan.
answer_key_raw:
R1:
R1> enable
R1# configure terminal
R1(config)# ip sla 10
R1(config-ip-sla)# icmp-echo 10.12.1.2
R1(config-ip-sla-echo)# frequency 300
R1(config-ip-sla-echo)# exit
R1(config)# ip sla schedule 10 life forever start-time now
R1(config)# interface Ethernet0/0
R1(config-if)# ip flow monitor Monitor-R1Flow input
R1(config-if)# ip flow monitor Monitor-R1Flow output
R1(config-if)# end
R1# write

Sw1:
Sw1> enable
Sw1# configure terminal
Sw1(config)# monitor session 12 source vlan 12 both
Sw1(config)# monitor session 12 destination interface e1/3
Sw1(config)# end
Sw1# write
explanation: Flow monitor interface'e input ve output yonlerinde uygulanır. VLAN SPAN'de kaynak 'source vlan 12'dir; hedef port e1/3, session 12. IP SLA ICMP echo hedefi PC1'in IP'si (10.12.1.2), frequency 300 saniyedir ve schedule edilmeden başlamaz. Bu item'da monitor adı 'Monitor-R1Flow' (önceki sorulardaki 'Monitor-FlowR1' ile karıştırma!).
